=== TRAEFIK FULL CONFIG ===
networks:
  n8n-traefik_default:
    external: true
services:
  n8n:
    depends_on:
    - postgres
    environment:
      AMOCRM_DOMAIN: ${AMOCRM_DOMAIN}
      AMOCRM_TOKEN: ${AMOCRM_TOKEN}
      DB_POSTGRESDB_DATABASE: n8n
      DB_POSTGRESDB_HOST: postgres
      DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      DB_POSTGRESDB_PORT: 5432
      DB_POSTGRESDB_USER: n8n
      DB_TYPE: postgresdb
      GENERIC_TIMEZONE: ${GENERIC_TIMEZONE}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD}
      N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER: ${N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER}
      N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL: https://n8n.marbomebel.ru/
      N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY: ${N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY}
      N8N_HOST: n8n.marbomebel.ru
      N8N_PORT: 5678
      N8N_PROTOCOL: https
      N8N_PROXY_HOPS: '1'
      N8N_SECURE_COOKIE: ${N8N_SECURE_COOKIE}
      TZ: ${TZ}
      WEBHOOK_URL: https://n8n.marbomebel.ru/
    image: n8nio/n8n:latest
    labels:
    - traefik.enable=true
    - traefik.http.routers.n8n.rule=Host("n8n.marbomebel.ru")
    - traefik.http.routers.n8n.entrypoints=websecure
    - traefik.http.routers.n8n.tls=true
    - traefik.http.routers.n8n.tls.certresolver=mytlschallenge
    - traefik.http.services.n8n.loadbalancer.server.port=5678
    networks:
    - n8n-traefik_default
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
    - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
  postgres:
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: n8n
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_USER: n8n
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    networks:
    - n8n-traefik_default
    ports:
    - 127.0.0.1:5432:5432
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
    - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  voice-app:
    image: nginx:alpine
    labels:
    - traefik.enable=true
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.rule=Host("n8n.marbomebel.ru") && PathPrefix("/voice")
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.entrypoints=websecure
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.tls=true
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.tls.certresolver=mytlschallenge
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.priority=100
    - traefik.http.middlewares.voice-strip.stripprefix.prefixes=/voice
    - traefik.http.routers.voice.middlewares=voice-strip
    - traefik.http.services.voice.loadbalancer.server.port=80
    networks:
    - n8n-traefik_default
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
    - /root/n8n-automation/pwa:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro
    - /root/n8n-automation/pwa/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
volumes:
  n8n_data: null
  postgres_data: null

=== DOMAINS RESOLVING ===

command: echo '=== XRAY CONFIG ===' && cat /usr/local/x-ui/bin/config.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || cat /usr/local/x-ui/bin/config.json 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '=== X-UI DB INBOUNDS ===' && sqlite3 /etc/x-ui/x-ui.db 'SELECT * FROM inbounds;' 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '=== X-UI DB SETTINGS ===' && sqlite3 /etc/x-ui/x-ui.db '.headers on' '.mode column' 'SELECT * FROM settings;' 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '=== TRAEFIK FULL CONFIG ===' && cat /opt/n8n/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev
intent: Get Xray config, X-UI DB details, Traefik config, DNS resolution
